reviews.review_description: This used to be my favorite go-to app for casual watching. It was lightweight and  worked perfectly. Great in passthrough to have giant screen anywhere to watch shows. No forced environment I could use it how I wanted where I wanted. I used to muse that the other streaming apps should take note. Why, Pluto? this is needlessly complicated, cumbersome, unusable. I believe the turn of phrase is en-ish-ification, if you catch my drift. Yikes.

I love Pluto TV. Watch it most nights at bed time, even though I have acces to non ad streaming services...but the meta quest app is trash. Tried for about 30 minutes to figure out how to use it. Forced immersed environment. Simply no way to know how to do literally anything with the controls, not even pull up the channel menu, literally the most basic function. Pulled it up on the browser and was signed in and watching a floating screen, like nearly every person wants, in about 30 seconds. There was obviously no user testing on this app.

reviews.review_title: Not available in my region - Canada
reviews.review_description: Used to be available here, now no longer. I can access using the web instead

when it comes to streaming media on my quest 3 i prefer flat app and not Its own virtual space. it's just my personal preference to watch streaming shows and movies either in passthrough or is a social 
VR game, but because this app went VR I now can't launch it while in another VR app, so I guess I'll stick to using Pluto tv in the browser app. The only way I could see this even remotely working is if they used our quest avatars in the VR space and/or let us invite our friends to watch in the space with us.

reviews.review_title: Crisp image, live TV, No Passthrough :(
reviews.review_description: The updated app took away passthrough / mixed reality mode which was so cool.  I used to be able to use my Quest 3 to remotely operate my windows 11 PC while watching Bloomberg TV.  This new immersed version essentially removes multi-tasking / windowed AR/MR capabilities.  So bummed!  I can launch Pluto on Win 11 via quest remote desktop, but it isn't nearly as cool.

Not working for me.  Gives message not available here ...yet.
Meanwhile the old version is no longer available either.  So I have no access at all. Please fix or make the old version available again. Other wise thanks for the great app that can be used on other platforms.

i very much enjoyed the original pluto tv app that was on meta quest. but this app which replace the original pluto tv app is a total disappointment and nowhere as good as the original. i cannot recommend it.

reviews.review_title: There is no point to this.
reviews.review_description: It's not a bad app. But there is just no point in having it. Maybe if it had a multiplayer it would make more sense. But it's just a singleplayer experience.

reviews.review_title: Flat Pluto never worked for me
reviews.review_description: I understand why they all say bring back flat Pluto, but I never got the flat version of Pluto to work in VR without Virtual Desktop as the flat version would black screen for me (and at that point, I may as well take off my headset and use my phone). This app works just as well as the Immersive Beta, which is FANTASTIC!! I just wish the flat version was left live so people wouldn't tank the ratings because they can no longer multi-task (just use another monitor on your PC like I had to do until I found Immersive worked people... its simple).
Not available in Canada

reviews.review_title: Huge mistake, bring back old app
reviews.review_description: First: I like PlutoTV, tell other people about it, watch a lot of shows there on my phone and (up until now) in my VR headset. This new app is a mistake in every way: less control over screen position, less control over environment, less able to multitask. Environments all look like bad VR Chat rooms, but even if they were good this would still be functionally worse in every way the the original app they depreciated. Bring back the old simpler app and on behalf of actual fans who watch PlutoTV - not an exaggeration, a completely earnest recommendation - please fire the decision makers responsible for this disaster.
theres soo many ads like every Couple of minutes theres one.
I don't understand why this immersion version exists if you can only watch it alone. For solo viewing there is no point
No instructions. Can’t figure out how to access ch guide.
its good i like it
It's really nice for what it is. I love it! 5 stars

The virtual “environments” don’t feel well thought out and are completely unnecessary..
It would be different if it were a social app, 
and people could invite friends and interact..
But even then a pass through mode would ease the eye strain and clumsiness of being essentially stuck and alone in a virtual room with a screen.

I've been wanting an app to watch movies and shows in a fun way. I like how there's different rooms with different styles of TV screens. I don't get to make it to the movie theater very often so it's fun to experience it at home without others disturbing the movie. The function to have the room's lights on or off was also a nice touch.

nothing was wrong with the flat app , this app is going back to being like the netflix app what's the point of this immersive mode if no content is 3d and its not social i don't see a friend invite system or anything similar to how bigscreen lets you watch content with friends.
The keypad does not have _
